description: Halo 是一款强大易用的开源建站工具，从个人博客、知识库，到企业官网、在线商城，Halo 都能助您轻松实现，一站式满足您的多样化建站需求。
Free and Open source Web Builder Framework. Next generation tool for building templates without coding
Modern, Crazy Fast, Ridiculously Easy and Amazingly Powerful Flat-File CMS powered by PHP, Markdown, Twig, and Symfony
🧱 Describe your site, AI builds it, you own it as Markdown. Snap together Tailwind blocks like Lego — landing pages, blogs, portfolios, docs & more. No AI slop. Free to deploy anywhere 👇

Open source website builder and Webflow alternative. Webstudio is an advanced visual builder that connects to any headless CMS, supports all CSS properties, and can be hosted anywhere, including with us.
Drag and drop page builder library written in vanilla javascript without dependencies or build tools.
Home of the Joomla! Content Management System
A full-featured, open-source content management framework built with Node.js that empowers organizations by combining in-context editing and headless architecture in a full-stack JS environment.
Drag and Drop Website Builder and CMS with E-commerce
A code driven low-code builder, develop low-code app on your codebase.
Multilingual PHP CMS built with Laravel  and bootstrap
Silex is an online tool for visually creating static sites with dynamic data. With the free/libre spirit of internet, together.
Craft beautiful websites effortlessly with an intuitive visual builder and publish them instantly
Our Wedding Website 👫
A modular multilingual CMS built with Laravel, enabling developers to manage structured content like pages, news, events, and more.
Easily make Flutter apps responsive. Automatically adapt UI to different screen sizes. Responsiveness made simple. Demo: https://gallery.codelessly.com/flutterwebsites/minimal/
Framely: The open-source, lightweight, multi-tenant drag-and-drop website editor for modern web applications, powered by Next.js
Open source Medium alternative- set up your personal blog in minutes.
Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

😻 pH7Builder (formerly pH7CMS) is a Professional & Open Source Social Dating CMS written in PHP 8. This Social Dating Script aims to be low resource-intensive, powerful, and secure. pH7Builder includes over 40 modules. It is the first Professional, Free & Open Source Social Dating Site Builder Software and the first choice for enterprise-level app
